messages.content: Legacy code uses structNew() for response payload. Modernize it.
Legacy code uses arrayNew(1) to collect results. Replace with modern syntax.
Replace loop-based filtering with member function filter().
Replace loop-based map transformation with member function map().
Modernize concatenated default assignment to null-coalescing style.
Replace manual structKeyExists branching with Elvis operator fallback in action code.
Convert procedural duplicate-removal logic to array member function chain.
Refactor manual counting loop to array len() and predicates.
Replace verbose string accumulation loop with arrayToList + map idiom.
Update legacy if/else struct mutation to direct literal rebuild pattern.
In CFML string literals, how do I compare against a literal # without breaking delimiter escaping?
What does ## mean in a ColdFusion string, and when is it intentional?
Why did new path.to.Component() give me a struct instead of a component instance?
Should I replace new ComponentName() with createObject() for CF10 compatibility?
